overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) depicting a walk across a sunny urban intersection and along a city sidewalk lined with palm trees, modern high-rise buildings, and moderate traffic. The scene features clear blue skies, warm lighting, and a mix of commercial buildings and street infrastructure.

steps onto the concrete sidewalk from the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the zebra crosswalk and arriving at the opposite sidewalk

dark sedan passing through the intersection

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying an advertisement with a woman
white food truck with yellow and red signage
low-rise commercial strip with green awnings and various storefronts
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The video opens at a sunny urban intersection with a wide crosswalk. The camera crosses the street as a taco truck and sedan drive through the intersection. A large billboard is visible in the distance, and commercial buildings line the opposite side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with palm trees and modern high-rise

box truck with 'DEALS & DOLLARS' logo driving along the street

tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
various cars parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk with a tall curved glass building on the left and palm trees providing shade. The camera briefly looks up at the building facade. Parked cars line the street, and a box truck passes by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with traffic lights and utility poles

events.description: green garbage truck drives along the street parallel to the sidewalk
passing red newspaper vending machines on the sidewalk

red newspaper vending machines on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The walk continues past traffic lights and utility poles lining the street. A garbage truck drives by on the road, and the camera passes newspaper stands on the sidewalk. More pedestrians are visible walking ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk near tall building entrance

events.description: approaching the columned entrance of the tall curved building

agents.ego_description: walking past pedestrians near the building entrance at the end of the block

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a drink walking past the camera
pedestrian in white shirt and cap walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: entrance to the tall curved building with white columns and driveway

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the entrance of the tall curved building with its distinctive columned entryway. The camera passes a few more pedestrians on the sidewalk as the walk continues past the building entrance, with the urban street extending ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk from a wide, sunny urban intersection toward the entrance of a modern glass skyscraper. It begins by crossing a broad street as a taco truck and sedan pass through the intersection, with commercial buildings and a distant billboard framing the view. As the camera reaches the sidewalk, the scene shifts to a path lined with palm trees and parked cars, briefly tilting upward to take in the facade of a tall curved glass building. The walk then continues past traffic lights, utility poles, and newspaper stands while a garbage truck drives by and other pedestrians move ahead. Finally, the camera approaches and passes the building's distinctive columned entryway, continuing along the sidewalk as the urban street extends into the distance.
